items.title: Better production crash reporting
items.description: Baskit now reports unexpected app crashes with Firebase Crashlytics so issues can be found and fixed faster.

items.title: Clearer error diagnostics
items.description: Firebase, sign-in, local storage, version tracking, Alexa linking, and contact suggestion errors now include more specific diagnostic details.

items.title: Stronger code checks
items.description: Additional analyzer rules help catch correctness issues earlier during development and release validation.
